title: Junior Instructional Designer at Don Bosco Tech Consulting Pvt Ltd
company: Don Bosco Tech Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at Don Bosco Tech Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Don Bosco Tech Consulting Pvt Ltd. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Hyderabad-based team.

About Don Bosco Tech Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Don Bosco Tech Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Support students with special educational needs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Don Bosco Tech Consulting Pvt Ltd!
